text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer, to the beginning of the<n>Classic Triple
Crown, the Satsuki Sho!
choice_data_list: I know you can do it!
I know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Naturally. But first, to put on some<n>proper attire to
greet my audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hello, fans of mine and fans-to-be!<n>How
wonderful it is to see you here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to introduce today's<n>supporting cast.
The one standing<n>before me is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega, aka Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega gets dragged out of her<n>hiding spot in
the shadows.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Such a glum face... What troubles you,<n>Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gah?! You mean to say your name is<n>not Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, your name must be... Love! You<n>are truly
love in and of itself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: One and all, meet Love! Lala lala. ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Just stick with Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And I told you to leave me be. Why<n>are you doing
this?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't be like that. I thought we<n>had an
understanding, you and I, after<n>all the running
we've done together.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I already know everything about you.<n>Yes... You
are an Umamusume at<n>Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And you strive for victory in the<n>Satsuki Sho!
How's that? Hahaa!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...That sums up what I know.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd call that only the bare minimum.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! So, you had reserved<n>the rest for
today, then!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then let us walk side by side to the<n>track, o rival
of mine!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What is it with you? I was trying to<n>concentrate!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But you won't stop me! Nothing will<n>stop me!
Because I'm... not racing for<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh?
Heheh. ♪ Well then, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O elegantly approaches<n>Admire Vega
and leads her away.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The curtain rises for the first act of<n>our legend!
